name: Rice Kugel
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream Cheese, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Add cream cheese, cottage cheese, and 1/4 cup butter. Stir until smooth.
3. Cool slightly. Add sugar, orange and lemon peel; mix well.
4. Beat eggs and stir into the cream mixture.
5. Stir in rice. Pour into a greased 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
6. Combine rice cereal and brown sugar; sprinkle over rice mixture.
7. Pour remaining 1/4 cup melted butter over top.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes, or until the center is barely set.
